slots.notes: Circular author/testimonial portraits, one per feedback entry. Rendered w-14 h-14 rounded-full object-cover with referrerPolicy="no-referrer", swapped on slide change. Native prompt fills these with picsum.photos placeholder portraits; reskin supplies real headshots of the quoted people (or brand-appropriate stand-ins). Card count tracks the feedbacks array length (3 here).

Functional carousel chrome (not brand assets): previous/next arrows inside the two circular #D9D9D9 buttons (w-6 h-6 text-black, strokeWidth 1.5). Native source is lucide-react ArrowLeft / ArrowRight. Only swap if the brand has its own icon system; transparent so the grey button shows through.
Primary UI typeface for every visible string in this section: the section title, the large guillemet quote (font-light, tracking-tight, size
